name: Taco Casserol
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare the bottom of a 2 1/2-quart casserole dish lightly with cooking spray.
3. In a skillet, brown the turkey and cook onion and peppers until tender.
4. Add taco seasoning mix and taco sauce; stir and set aside.
5. In a medium bowl, combine sour cream and cottage cheese; set aside.
6. Place crushed chips in the bottom of the dish.
7. Add meat mixture to cover the chips, then cover with the sour cream mixture.
8. Sprinkle grated cheese on top.
9. Bake, uncovered, for 30 to 35 minutes or until cheese melts and casserole is heated through.
